## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between GrowthX and Acquisition.com to explore potential collaboration on content creation and AI-driven marketing strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/bNGa1u7nBisZFQUnaJEDVomzKbnTnboB?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content creation services, focusing on daily publishing and LLM optimization](https://fathom.video/share/bNGa1u7nBisZFQUnaJEDVomzKbnTnboB?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [Acquisition.com recently broke a world record for book sales, leveraging multi-channel marketing strategies](https://fathom.video/share/bNGa1u7nBisZFQUnaJEDVomzKbnTnboB?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [Both companies share a philosophy of providing high-value content to build trust and drive growth](https://fathom.video/share/bNGa1u7nBisZFQUnaJEDVomzKbnTnboB?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [Potential partnership would involve GrowthX creating 5 articles per week for Acquisition.com, with a focus on AI-optimized SEO](https://fathom.video/share/bNGa1u7nBisZFQUnaJEDVomzKbnTnboB?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Service Offering

  - [End-to-end content partner using AI workflows for efficient, high-quality content creation](https://fathom.video/share/bNGa1u7nBisZFQUnaJEDVomzKbnTnboB?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [Strategy sprint (8 weeks, $30-40K) to develop artifacts and initial content](https://fathom.video/share/bNGa1u7nBisZFQUnaJEDVomzKbnTnboB?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [12-month growth execution phase with daily publishing (5 articles/week)](https://fathom.video/share/bNGa1u7nBisZFQUnaJEDVomzKbnTnboB?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [Includes SEO strategy, LLM analytics, and content optimization](https://fathom.video/share/bNGa1u7nBisZFQUnaJEDVomzKbnTnboB?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [No need for additional SEO agency or LLM analytics tools](https://fathom.video/share/bNGa1u7nBisZFQUnaJEDVomzKbnTnboB?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)

### Acquisition.com's Recent Success

  - [Broke world record for most books sold in 24 hours ($105 million in 3 days)](https://fathom.video/share/bNGa1u7nBisZFQUnaJEDVomzKbnTnboB?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [Leveraged multi-channel approach: 2,600 video ads, custom funnels, affiliate program](https://fathom.video/share/bNGa1u7nBisZFQUnaJEDVomzKbnTnboB?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [Heavy focus on pre-launch activities and delivering value beyond book price](https://fathom.video/share/bNGa1u7nBisZFQUnaJEDVomzKbnTnboB?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [Encountered and overcame platform limits (e.g., Facebook ad limits, Google approvals)](https://fathom.video/share/bNGa1u7nBisZFQUnaJEDVomzKbnTnboB?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Deep research and artifact development (personas, brand voice, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/bNGa1u7nBisZFQUnaJEDVomzKbnTnboB?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [AI-powered workflows for content brief creation, research, and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/bNGa1u7nBisZFQUnaJEDVomzKbnTnboB?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [Human experts in the loop for quality control and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/bNGa1u7nBisZFQUnaJEDVomzKbnTnboB?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [Focus on creating comprehensive, credible content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/bNGa1u7nBisZFQUnaJEDVomzKbnTnboB?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)

### AI and SEO Strategy

  - [Emphasis on getting content picked up by AI search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity)](https://fathom.video/share/bNGa1u7nBisZFQUnaJEDVomzKbnTnboB?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [Daily publishing to increase visibility and authority](https://fathom.video/share/bNGa1u7nBisZFQUnaJEDVomzKbnTnboB?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [Focus on credible, comprehensive content over extensive backlinking](https://fathom.video/share/bNGa1u7nBisZFQUnaJEDVomzKbnTnboB?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule follow-up call for Wednesday at 12 PM Pacific](https://fathom.video/share/bNGa1u7nBisZFQUnaJEDVomzKbnTnboB?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare a detailed proposal and pricing breakdown](https://fathom.video/share/bNGa1u7nBisZFQUnaJEDVomzKbnTnboB?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
  - [Discuss potential scope of work and integration with Acquisition.com's existing systems (e.g., HubSpot)](https://fathom.video/share/bNGa1u7nBisZFQUnaJEDVomzKbnTnboB?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)
  - [Explore how GrowthX's platform and workflows can benefit Acquisition.com's content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/bNGa1u7nBisZFQUnaJEDVomzKbnTnboB?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)
